title: Jesse Decker
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Jesse}}
'''Jesse Decker''' has written many articles in the magazine titled ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]''.

*"[[Special Ops: The Shaman]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]]
*"[[Special Ops: The Charlatan]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]]
*"[[Special Ops: The Freelancer]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]]
*"[[Special Ops: The Dilettante]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]
*"[[Special Ops: The Mercenary]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]
*"[[Special Ops: Battle Empath]]" in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]
*"[[Signal Interruption]]" on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website
